allow: PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/software" -UseBasicParsing; "/ => $\($r1.StatusCode\)"; "/admin => $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; "/api/software => $\($r3.StatusCode\)"; \($r3.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).Count; "items in JSON")

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match "ADMIN"\) { "OK: Admin badge" }; if \($html -match "Thêm phần mềm"\) { "OK: Add button" }; if \($html -match "AdminDashboard"\) { "OK: Component rendered" }; if \($html -match "Quản lý danh sách"\) { "OK: Subtitle" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Chọn tất cả"\) { "OK: Select all button" }; if \($r.Content -match "BulkDownloadModal"\) { "OK: Bulk modal" }; if \($r.Content -match "SelectionBar"\) { "OK: Selection bar" })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('.next/static/chunks/0.9t2b6h683_d.css','utf8'\); const darkParts=css.match\(/prefers-color-scheme[^}]*/g\); console.log\('Media query dark:', darkParts ? darkParts.slice\(0,3\) : 'NONE'\); const classParts=css.match\(/\\.dark[^{,\\s]+[^}]*dark[^}]*/g\); console.log\('Class dark sample:', classParts ? classParts[0].slice\(0,200\) : 'NONE'\)")
